name: Operation.ProgressBar
summary: The ProgressBar class implements progress bar with cancel button.

constructors.name: Operation.ProgressBar
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Operation.ProgressBar class

methods.name: Canceled
methods.summary: Check if cancel has been pressed.

returns.doc: True if cancel has been pressed.

methods.name: Close
methods.summary: Close progress bar. Can be called even if Display was not successful.

methods.name: Display
methods.signature: public bool Display(int SleepTime, string Title, string Message, string CancelButtonLabel, string ProgressLabel)
methods.summary: Display progress bar dialog with cancel button. Display will fail if progress bar is already displayed.

params.name: SleepTime
params.doc: Time (ms) to wait until bar is displayed.

params.name: Message
params.doc: Message to be displayed on the dialog above progress bar.

params.name: ProgressLabel
params.doc: Initial progress label (updated with SetProgress). If empty of null no bar exists.

returns.doc: True if bar was displayed successfully (meaning bar must be closed later).

methods.name: SetProgress
methods.signature: public void SetProgress(string ProgressLabel, int Progress)
methods.summary: Update status information on the progress bar.
